overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic western video game showing a cowboy character walking through a desert canyon at night. The character travels along a dirt path beside rocky cliffs under a starry sky, encountering a horseback rider passing by, before turning left toward the open wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon trail with cliff wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside the rocky cliff face under the night sky

entered.detail: tall rock wall forming the canyon side, visible throughout the segment
sandy dirt path winding through the desert terrain
sparse dry bushes and small plants scattered across the desert floor
dark blue night sky filled with visible stars
silhouetted mountain peaks on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow desert canyon trail at night, with a rocky cliff face on the left and open desert on the right. The path is illuminated by moonlight under a starry sky, with sparse vegetation visible in the surrounding terrain.

events.description: rider on horseback passes by on the left side of the path, moving in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as a horseback rider passes by on the left side

notable_agents.action: riding a horse along the path, passing by the character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: boulder formation visible on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the canyon trail as a horseback rider passes by on the left. The terrain features large rock formations on the right side of the path, with the cliff wall remaining on the left and the starry sky overhead.

events.description: character turns left at the path junction, changing direction toward the cliff formation

agents.ego_description: turning left off the main path and walking toward the rocky cliff area ahead

entered.detail: large rock outcropping now visible directly ahead after the turn
scattered large rocks on the right side of the new path

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at a trail junction, heading toward a large rocky cliff formation now visible ahead. The spatial layout opens up as the character moves away from the narrow canyon wall, with desert boulders visible on the right side of the new path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow desert canyon that gradually opens into a wider, boulder-strewn wilderness under a starry night sky. It begins with the character walking along a moonlit trail flanked by a towering rocky cliff face on the left and sparse vegetation on the right. As the journey continues, the camera tracks the character past a horseback rider moving in the opposite direction, while the terrain shifts to include large rock formations on the right side of the path. The scene then expands as the character reaches a junction and turns left, moving away from the confining canyon wall. Finally, the perspective opens up toward a massive rocky cliff formation ahead, with scattered desert boulders lining the new path.
